abstracts.abstract: By Mr. O'Connor and Mr. Kearney of Scituate a joint petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2577) of Patrick M. O'Connor (by vote of the town) relative to parking fines in the town of Scituate.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

bill.title: An Act relative to parking fines in the town of Scituate

action.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
